calendar.matters:
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-24-2006 Off Calendar

MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar May-25-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Thomas Metz's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff's Form Interrogatories, Set No. 1; Requests For Production Of Documents, Set No. One 1; Requests For Admissions, Set No. 1 is granted in part and denied in part.
The motion is granted as to Form Interrogatory No. 3.7. The response is inadequate. Licensing information is reasonably available upon reasonable and good faith effort to obtain by inquiry to other persons or organizations. Discovery is continuing is an inadequate response.
The motion is denied as to Form Interrogatory Nos. 7.1, 7.2, 7.3, 9.1, and 9.2 except as the response is that discovery is continuing. However, the responses are otherwise adequate.
The motion is granted as to Request for Documents No. 3, as the response states that discovery is continuing. Additionally, the objections are ordered stricken.
The motion is granted as to Request For Documents No. 13 as the response that discovery is continuing is inadequate.
The motion is denied as to Request For Admissions No. 1.
The motion is granted as to Request For Admissions Nos. 3, 7, 10, and 11 as the objections are overruled.
Further responses shall be made within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
